title: Israel 120+ strikes on Lebanon in heaviest day in weeks — 12 killed in Mashghara, ground ops expand past security zone, additional battalion called up
snippet: Israel pounded Lebanon with 120+ air strikes on May 26, one of the heaviest days in weeks. IDF struck 100+ Hezbollah sites across southern Lebanon and Bekaa Valley targeting storage facilities, command centers and observation points. A strike on Mashghara village killed 12 including family members. Israel called up an additional battalion and expanded ground operations past the security zone. IDF-Hezbollah clashed along a strategic river. Cumulative toll since March 2: 3,213 killed per Lebanon health ministry. The escalation comes 3 days before June 2-3 Washington talks.
tag_reason: Significant escalation — heaviest bombing in weeks, ground ops expansion, 12 killed Mashghara
